hero.subtitle: An immersive social experience where guests become part of a sophisticated espionage mission set on the shores of Lake Como.
hero.title: The Spies of Style Mission Experience

phases.description:
Your mission begins the moment you receive your intelligence briefing. Clues are hidden in our map of the lake, waiting for you to uncover your secret codename and agent mission. Work together, study the maps, and crack the codes—your spy skills will be put to the test.

Access the Mission Through:
• Interactive mobile app experience
• Printed intelligence dossier and map
• Physical clues embedded in the event program

Between decoding messages, immerse yourself in the world of espionage: strike a pose with Bond-inspired backdrops and spy props, or dance to the thrilling spy soundtrack.
phases.title: Collaborative Code Breaking

setup.description:
Through a series of clues, maps, and coded transmissions, guests work together throughout the evening to uncover the identity and mission of a secret agent connected to real wartime intrigue on Lake Como.

The experience unfolds organically during the event, encouraging interaction, collaboration, and discovery.
setup.title: The Setup

experience.sectionSubtitle: Unlock the codes, solve the mission, and reveal the secret together
experience.sectionTitle: Step Into A True Spy Story

story.headline: Spies of Style

bullets: Solve the type of codes used by Mallaby
Experience the suspense and strategy of a true spy mission
Collaborate with teams in a cinematic setting
Walk in the footsteps of the spy who is said to have inspired James Bond
real007.heading: Cecil Mallaby: The British Spy Who Helped Free Italy and Inspired James Bond
real007.paragraph1:
During World War II, intelligence operative Cecil Mallaby, a British officer working for the key organization created by Winston Churchill to “set Europe ablaze” by sabotage, resistance coordination, and espionage, arrived secretly in Cernobbio on Lake Como carrying a critical Allied mission. His audacious operations, coded messages, and elegant style remain part of the region's wartime history. In the course of the Second World War, whereas armies clashed throughout Europe, a quieter, extra covert battle was being fought behind enemy traces. 

In the summer of 1943, Mallaby undertook a mission that played an important role in shifting Italy’s position in the war and opening the door to the Allied liberation of the country. His operations, shrouded in secrecy for many years, remain some of the fascinating examples of Allied intelligence work in wartime Italy.
real007.paragraph2: Historians believe Mallaby's daring missions and sophistication inspired elements of Ian Fleming's James Bond, from secret communications to high-stakes espionage in glamorous locations.

story.subheadline: Step into the true mission of Cecil Richard Mallaby — a WWII spy whose daring story inspired James Bond — through an immersive dinner or cocktail experience on Lake Como.

events.description: Inaugurate the season in spectacular style at the renowned Corso Eleganza. Join us for an exclusive spy-themed cocktail event at Terzo Crotto with themed cocktails and savory bites in a vintage wine cellar.
events.title: Corso Eleganza May 16, 2026 Season Kick Off Cocktail Party

events.description: Experience the mystery and luxury on a weekly basis high above the lake. Enjoy bespoke cocktails, curated styling sessions, and the unparalleled ambiance of a historic retreat.
events.title: Weekly Spies of Style Dinners
